phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Grand Bé island
phrases.text_local: Comment accéder à l'île du Grand Bé ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ak-say-DAY ah leel doo grahn BAY
phrases.cultural_note: Grand Bé is a tidal island. Walk from the Digue de la Virginié (the causeway near the Bonnets Rouges lighthouse) at low tide. The walk takes about 20 minutes.

responses.english: At low tide, on foot from the ramparts. About twenty minutes.
responses.phonetic: wee byan soor, see say dee-spoh-nee-BL
responses.local: À marée basse, à pied depuis les remparts. Comptez vingt minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much time you need for the visit
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps faut-il pour visiter l'île ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN duh tahn foh-TEEL poor vee-zee-TAY LEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Grand Bé is a small tidal island. A full visit takes about 30-45 minutes including the walk.

responses.english: Allow about an hour round trip, including the visit.
responses.phonetic: kohn-TAY oon UHR ah-LAY ruh-TOOR, ah-VEK lah vee-ZEET
responses.local: Comptez une heure aller-retour, avec la visite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view from Grand Bé
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la vue depuis le Grand Bé ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah VYOO duh-PWEE luh grahn BAY
phrases.cultural_note: Grand Bé offers 360-degree views: the Saint-Malo walls, the Channel Islands (Jersey on clear days), and the entire bay.

responses.english: Panoramic view of the ramparts and the bay.
responses.local: Vue panoramique sur les remparts et la baie.

phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est la basse mer aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR eh lah bas MAIR oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Check tide times carefully. You need at least 3 hours of low tide to visit Grand Bé comfortably. The tourist office posts daily times.

responses.english: Check at the tourist office or on the sign near the beach.
responses.phonetic: wee, may ruh-gar-DAY layz oh-REHR ah-fee-SHAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
responses.local: Vérifiez à l'office de tourisme ou sur le panneau près de la plage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there's a café on the island
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un café sur l'île ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un kah-FAY soor LEEL
phrases.cultural_note: There are no cafés on Grand Bé — bring water and snacks. The nearby Digue de la Virginié has a small café at the parking area.

responses.english: No, there's nothing on the island. Bring water.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ahn plu-ZYUR dahn luh kar-TYAY
responses.local: Non, il n'y a rien sur l'île. Apportez de l'eau.
